creator: michael.grunewald@laposte.net
text:
Hi Timothy,

thank you for your patch.  I submitted a similar patch for several
weeks, see ports/173453.  Would you mind testing the latter and report
if you notice important differences?

This PR is a duplicate of ports/173453 and should be closed.  Future
conversation on this topic should take place in ports/173453.

Thank you for your help!
Michael
